market_context:
Cohort size: 357 listings scraped in the same market.
Median nightly rate: £175.00

title_variants: Historic London Home with Pool Table
analysis.rewritten_desc: Step into a meticulously maintained late-1800s property that blends historic charm with modern amenities. This entire four-bedroom home offers 4 guests a unique opportunity to experience architectural heritage combined with modern comforts. The standout feature is the full-sized pool table in the main living area, perfect for game nights or casual entertainment. With £590 per night, this property provides exceptional space and character for those seeking a special London stay. While the listing currently highlights the home’s era (1800s) and pool table, guests would benefit from clearer visibility about additional features like parking availability, outdoor space, or Wi-Fi speed — let's discuss optimizing these details to match the property’s value proposition.
analysis.photo_order_rec: The front facade of the 1800s home would make the strongest cover photo to leverage the property’s historic appeal and premium positioning. Follow with 2-3 high-quality interior shots showing the pool table in natural light.
key_diagnosis: Nightly rate is £590 (+237% vs £175 median) while occupancy (25%) trails median cohort performance (28.3%)
No amenities listed despite being Entire home rental type — missing 3+ high-impact feature categories (Parking, Outdoor, Entertainment)
62 reviews but host's 0 years active hosting vs market median host activity of ~2.7 years (based on same-city listing data)
analysis.outreach_hook: Your £590 home in [Location] outprices competitors by 237% but has 3.3% lower occupancy (25% booked vs 28.3% median)
